scripts.refresh:shared-dependencies: bun ./scripts/ensure-shared-package-fresh.mjs --refresh && cd solidity && bun ../scripts/ensure-shared-package-fresh.mjs --refresh && cd ../ui && bun ../scripts/ensure-shared-package-fresh.mjs --refresh
scripts.install:anvil: bash -lc 'if ! command -v anvil >/dev/null 2>&1; then curl -L https://foundry.paradigm.xyz | bash && export PATH="$HOME/.foundry/bin:$PATH" && foundryup; fi'
scripts.generate:ui: bun run generate:shared-js && bun run generate:ui-vendor
scripts.setup: bun ./scripts/install-frozen.mjs && bun ./scripts/install-frozen.mjs ui && bun run setup-contracts && bun run ui:vendor && cd ui && bun run refresh:shared-dependency && tsc && bun run build:workers && bun ./build/tests.mts
scripts.generate: bun run generate:contracts && bun run generate:ui-vendor
scripts.check:mainnet-deployment: bun run generate && bun run refresh:shared-dependencies && cd ui && bun x tsc --project tsconfig.json && cd .. && bun ./scripts/check-mainnet-deployment.mts
scripts.check:mainnet-deployment:generated: bun run generate && bun run refresh:shared-dependencies && bun ./scripts/check-mainnet-deployment.mts
scripts.tsc:solidity: cd solidity && bun ../scripts/ensure-shared-package-fresh.mjs --refresh && bun x tsc --project tsconfig.typecheck.json
scripts.tsc:solidity:current: cd solidity && bun x tsc --project tsconfig.typecheck.json
scripts.tsc:ci:current: bun run tsc:app && bun run tsc:scripts && bun run tsc:solidity:current
scripts.tsc: bun run ensure-shared-build && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc:app && bun run tsc:scripts && bun run tsc:solidity
scripts.ui:setup: bun ./scripts/install-frozen.mjs && bun ./scripts/install-frozen.mjs ui && cd solidity && bun run setup && cd .. && bun run ui:vendor && cd ui && bun run refresh:shared-dependency && tsc && bun run build:workers && bun ./build/tests.mts
scripts.app:build: bun run generate && cd ui && bun run build && bun run build:tests
scripts.ui:build:prod: bun run check:mainnet-deployment && cd ui && bun run build:prod
scripts.ui:build:prod:current: bun run check:mainnet-deployment:current && cd ui && bun ./build/production.mts
scripts.ui:build:prod:prepared: bun run refresh:shared-dependencies && cd ui && bun x tsc --project tsconfig.json && cd .. && bun run ui:build:prod:current
scripts.test: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc && bun run test:run
scripts.test:peripherals: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc:solidity && bun test --preload ./bun-test-setup-solidity.ts --timeout 300000 solidity/ts/tests/peripherals
scripts.test:security-pool-workflow: bun run ensure-shared-build && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc:app && bun test --preload ./bun-test-setup-ui.ts --timeout 300000 ui/ts/tests/features/security-pools/workflow
scripts.test:integration:mainnet: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && RUN_MAINNET_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 bun test --preload ./bun-test-setup-ui.ts --timeout 300000 ui/ts/tests/protocol/uniswapQuoter.integration.test.ts
scripts.test:integration:mainnet-fork: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && RUN_MAINNET_FORK_INTEGRATION_TESTS=1 bun test --preload ./bun-test-setup-ui.ts --timeout 300000 ./ui/ts/tests/protocol/uniswapQuoter.fork.test.ts
scripts.test:auction-fuzz: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc && bun test --timeout 300000 ./solidity/ts/fuzz/auctionTickMath.fuzz.ts
scripts.test:launch-invariants: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun run tsc:solidity && bun test --preload ./bun-test-setup-solidity.ts --timeout 300000 solidity/ts/tests/peripheralsInvariant.test.ts solidity/ts/tests/peripherals/escalationMigration.test.ts solidity/ts/tests/peripherals/truthAuction.test.ts ./solidity/ts/fuzz/auctionTickMath.fuzz.ts
scripts.coverage:ui: bun run ensure-shared-build && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun test --preload ./bun-test-setup-ui.ts --isolate --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-dir=coverage/ui ui/ts/tests
scripts.coverage:contracts:ts: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun test --timeout 300000 --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-reporter=text --coverage-dir=coverage/contracts-ts solidity/ts/tests
scripts.coverage:contracts:bytecode: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun ./scripts/run-solidity-bytecode-coverage.mts
scripts.coverage:contracts:bytecode:shard1: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun ./scripts/run-solidity-bytecode-coverage.mts --shard 1
scripts.coverage:contracts:bytecode:shard2: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun ./scripts/run-solidity-bytecode-coverage.mts --shard 2
scripts.coverage:typescript: bun run ensure-contract-artifacts && bun run check:shared-dependencies && bun ./scripts/run-typescript-coverage.mts
scripts.coverage:full: bun run coverage:typescript && bun run coverage:contracts:bytecode && bun run coverage:check
scripts.docs:check: bun run docs:check-html && bun run docs:check-examples && bun run docs:check-content && bun run docs:check-contract-reference && bun run docs:check-reference-values && bun run check:mainnet-deployment:generated
scripts.docs:check:current: bun run docs:check-html && bun run docs:check-examples && bun run docs:check-content && bun run docs:check-contract-reference && bun run docs:check-reference-values && bun run check:mainnet-deployment:current
scripts.check:static: bunx @biomejs/biome check package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json bun-test-setup*.ts README.md AGENTS.md .codex/review-contract.md docs open-oracle-arbitrager-src scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts ui/css && bun scripts/lint-no-bare-catch.mts && bun scripts/lint-no-signal-wrapper-comparisons.mts && bun scripts/lint-no-direct-viem-imports.mts && bun scripts/lint-no-nested-solidity-ternaries.mts && bun run lint:ui-layer-boundaries
scripts.check:repository: bun run lint:ui-strings && bun run check:agents && bun run check:solidity-format
scripts.check: bun run check:static && bun run docs:check && bun run check:repository
scripts.check:ci:current: bun run check:static && bun run docs:check:current && bun run check:repository
scripts.check:changed: bun scripts/check-changed.mts && bun run lint:ui-strings && bun run check:agents
scripts.lint: bun x @biomejs/biome check package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json bun-test-setup*.ts open-oracle-arbitrager-src scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts && bun scripts/lint-no-bare-catch.mts && bun scripts/lint-no-signal-wrapper-comparisons.mts && bun scripts/lint-no-direct-viem-imports.mts && bun scripts/lint-no-nested-solidity-ternaries.mts
scripts.lint:fix: bun x @biomejs/biome check --write package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json bun-test-setup*.ts open-oracle-arbitrager-src scripts shared/ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/build ui/dev-server.ts
scripts.format: bunx @biomejs/biome format --write package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json bun-test-setup*.ts README.md AGENTS.md .codex/review-contract.md docs open-oracle-arbitrager-src scripts shared/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/tsconfig.json ui/build ui/dev-server.ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/css && bun run format:solidity
scripts.format:check: bunx @biomejs/biome format package.json .prettierrc.json shared/package.json ui/package.json solidity/package.json tsconfig.scripts.json bun-test-setup*.ts README.md AGENTS.md .codex/review-contract.md docs open-oracle-arbitrager-src scripts shared/ts ui/AGENTS.md ui/tsconfig.json ui/build ui/dev-server.ts solidity/ts ui/ts ui/css && bun run check:solidity-format
scripts.ui:docker: docker build -f ui/Dockerfile . -t zoltar-ui && docker run --add-host=host.docker.internal:host-gateway zoltar-ui
